sections.content: The player moved RIGHT again, but only 29 cells changed (smaller than before). Let me check the current position to see if the player has reached the right edge.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Player Y: col {min(cols)}")
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue b: cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check row 38
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nRow 38: {ascii_lines[38]}")

# Count green blocks
n_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nGreen blocks: {n_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
